name: Massaï leather handbag
description:
HERMÈS Massai Orange Evercolor Leather Shoulder Bag / Handbag, Silver Hardware, Blind Stamp 🄾, Detachable Strap.

Length: 40 cm, Height: 37.5 cm, Width: 8 cm, Strap length: approx. 110 cm. Measurements may vary slightly depending on the measuring method.

Good condition with natural signs of use. Exterior and four corners have slight stains; exterior has slight creases and wear; hardware shows light wear; interior has light staining. Moderate wear on corners and bag opening. Light recoloring/touch-ups have been done in some areas. Current condition is as seen in the photos and does not affect normal use.

Special note: Due to photography lighting and differences in display color, slight variations in color may occur between the images and the actual item. Please refer to the physical product for the most accurate representation.
